title: James Lin
content:
People.ContactEmail jameslin@mccarthy.ca
- British Columbia, 2024
- University of British Columbia
James Lin is an associate in our Business Law Group and a member of our U.S. and Asia practice groups. A transactional lawyer with international experience, James advises domestic and foreign companies, private equity sponsors, and family offices on mergers and acquisitions, partnerships and joint ventures, and corporate governance matters. He has acted for clients in a wide range of industries, including technology, mining, energy, and retail & consumer products. A significant portion of his practice involves advising on cross-border transactions, including across the U.S. and the Asia-Pacific region.
Prior to joining McCarthy Tétrault, James practiced with Davis Polk & Wardwell LLP and Cooley LLP in their New York offices.
- Advising The Carlyle Group in its structured capital investment in Peloton Computer Enterprises, a provider of integrated energy data management software
- Advising 26North Partners in its acquisition of AVI-SPL, a provider of audio-video (AV) and unified communications technologies
- Acting as Canadian counsel to a U.S.-based strategic in its pending acquisition of a provider of intelligent wireless connectivity technologies
- Acting as Canadian counsel to a U.S-based private sponsor in its add-on investment in Canadian supply chain sustainability management software provider
- Acting as Canadian counsel to a U.S.-based private equity sponsor and its Canadian portfolio company in an bolt-on acquisition in the produce industry
- Advising Zijin Mining Group in its acquisition of the Akyem Gold Mine project in Ghana from Newmont Corporation for US$1 billion
- Advising Chinese enterprises in potential investments and acquisitions in the mining sector
- Advising Chinese enterprises in potential investments and acquisitions in the technology and transportation & logistics sectors
- Advising Methanex Corporation in its acquisition of OCI’s global methanol business for US$2.05 billion
- Advising Silvercorp Metals in its acquisition of Adventus Mining Corp., the owner of the gold-copper El Domo Project in Ecuador, for C$200 million
- Advising International Tower Hill Mines in its public and private placement offerings of approximately US$114.8 million
- Advising TELUS Health in its acquisition of Workplace Options, a provider of integrated employee wellbeing solutions, for approximately C$500 million
- Advising Vantage Airport Group in its acquisition of FSM Management Group, a provider of airport infrastructure management services, and AvEnergy Management Services, a provider of aviation energy logistic services
- Advising Corby Spirit and Wine and Ace Beverage Group in their acquisition of the Nude Beverage brand and related assets
James received his LLM in Taxation from New York University in 2018 and his Juris Doctor from the University of British Columbia in 2015. He was called to the New York bar in 2016, the Ontario bar in 2017 and the British Columbia bar in 2024. James clerked at the Tax Court of Canada between 2016 and 2017 and previously worked as a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) at Ernst & Young.
- Momentum acquired by Salesforce March 2, 2026
- The Carlyle Group provides structured capital to Peloton Computer Enterprises February 23, 2026
- International Tower Hill Mines completed upsized public offering of common shares and concurrent private placement January 29, 2026
- Vantage Airport Group's acquisition of FSM Management Group Inc. and AvEnergy Management Services Inc. January 2, 2026
- Hanmi Pharmaceutical acquires Aptose Biosciences for C$2.41 per share November 19, 2025
- Royal Gold to acquire Sandstorm Gold for US$3.5B and Horizon Copper for US$196M October 20, 2025
- Publication Technology Perspectives Outlook 2026 March 30, 2026
- Publication On Target: 2026 Private Equity Outlook 10th Edition January 5, 2026
- TechTalk Series - 2025 Speakers Jade Buchanan, David Crane, Robert Anton, Daniel G.C. Glover, Charles S. Morgan, Christine Ing, Vanessa Johnson, Michael Scherman, Connor Bildfell, James Lin November 26, 2025
